description: The Gallico are a 'ndrina (mafia clan) based in Palmi, Italy, active in extortion, drug trafficking, and infiltration of public contracts. They are the strongest family in the municipalities of Palmi, Barritteri, Melicuccà, and Seminara, and also operate in Rome. The clan has been involved in a long-running feud with the Parrello-Condello and Bruzzise clans, which ended in 1990. In 1994, Teresa Concetta Managò became the first female pentito of the 'Ndrangheta in a trial against the Gallico clan.

country_links.evidence_quote: nascosto in un'abitazione in Francia e ad Arma di Taggia. Quest'ultimo avrebbe partecipato a diverse riunioni a Borghetto Santo Spirito
country_links.context: The organization hid an affiliate in a house in France and held meetings in Borghetto Santo Spirito.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 13 febbraio 2018 viene arrestato a Monaco di Baviera il presunto affiliato ai Gallico Vincenzo Militano... Il 2 marzo 2018 viene arrestato a Saarbrücken , in Germania Emanuele Cosentino
country_links.context: The organization's affiliates were arrested in Munich and Saarbrücken.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 23 dicembre 2011 viene arrestato a Barcellona dai Mossos d'Esquadra e dalla Squadra Mobile di Reggio Calabria il boss Carmelo Gallico
country_links.context: The organization's boss Carmelo Gallico was arrested in Barcelona by local police.
